sentences.target: Mon partenaire arrive dans cinq minutes.

translations.fr: Mon partenaire arrive dans cinq minutes.
translations.en: My partner is arriving in five minutes.
translations.es: Mi pareja llega en cinco minutos.
translations.de: Mein Partner kommt in fünf Minuten.
translations.it: Il mio partner arriva tra cinque minuti.
translations.ru: Мой партнёр придёт через пять минут.
translations.pt: Meu parceiro chega em cinco minutos.
translations.he: בן הזוג שלי מגיע בעוד חמש דקות.
translations.vi: Bạn đời của tôi sẽ đến trong năm phút nữa.
translations.nl: Mijn partner komt over vijf minuten.
translations.uk: Мій партнер прибуде за п’ять хвилин.
translations.hu: A párom öt perc múlva megérkezik.
translations.hi: मेरा साथी पाँच मिनट में पहुँच रहा है.
translations.pl: Mój partner przyjdzie za pięć minut.
translations.el: Ο σύντροφός μου θα φτάσει σε πέντε λεπτά.
translations.nb: Partneren min kommer om fem minutter.
translations.id: Pasangan saya akan tiba dalam lima menit.
translations.sv: Min partner kommer om fem minuter.
translations.ro: Partenerul meu sosește în cinci minute.
translations.cs: Můj partner dorazí za pět minut.
translations.da: Min partner kommer om fem minutter.
translations.ja: パートナーが5分後に着きます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), modifies 'partenaire' in the subject noun phrase.
Common noun, head of the subject NP determined by 'Mon'.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular), predicates the sentence.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'minutes' within the temporal PP.
Plural common noun, object of 'dans'; head of the time expression.

translations.en: Your partner is already waiting outside.
translations.es: Su pareja ya está esperando afuera.
translations.it: Il suo partner sta già aspettando fuori.
translations.ko: 당신의 파트너는 이미 밖에서 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 您的伴侣已经在外面等着。
translations.yue: 您嘅伴侶已經喺出面等緊。
translations.pt: Seu parceiro já está esperando lá fora.
translations.he: בן הזוג שלך כבר מחכה בחוץ.
translations.vi: Đối tác của bạn đã chờ sẵn ở bên ngoài.
translations.hi: आपका साथी पहले से ही बाहर इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Państwa partner już czeka na zewnątrz.
translations.el: Ο σύντροφός σας περιμένει ήδη έξω.
translations.id: Pasangan Anda sudah menunggu di luar.
translations.ja: あなたのパートナーはすでに外で待っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person, formal/plural), modifies the subject noun 'partenaire'.
Common noun, head of the subject NP determined by 'Votre'.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular).
Adverb of time modifying 'attend'.
Adverb of place indicating location; complements the verb.

sentences.target: Je dois rencontrer ma partenaire ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dwa ʁɑ̃.kɔ̃.tʁe ma paʁ.tə.nɛʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Je dois rencontrer ma partenaire ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dwa ʁɑ̃.kɔ̃.tʁe ma paʁ.tə.nɛʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: I have to meet my partner tonight.
translations.es: Debo encontrarme con mi compañera esta noche.
translations.de: Ich muss mich heute Abend mit meiner Partnerin treffen.
translations.it: Devo incontrare la mia partner stasera.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤에 제 파트너를 만나야 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今晚得和我的搭档见面。
translations.yue: 我今晚要同我嘅拍檔見面。
translations.ru: Мне нужно встретиться с моей партнёршей сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Eu tenho que me encontrar com minha parceira esta noite.
translations.he: אני צריך להיפגש עם בת הזוג שלי הערב.
translations.vi: Tối nay tôi phải gặp bạn nhảy của mình.
translations.nl: Ik moet vanavond mijn partner ontmoeten.
translations.uk: Мені треба зустрітися зі своєю партнеркою сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: Ma este találkoznom kell a partneremmel.
translations.hi: मुझे आज रात अपनी साथी से मिलना है.
translations.pl: Muszę dziś wieczorem spotkać się z moją partnerką.
translations.el: Πρέπει να συναντήσω την παρτενέρ μου απόψε.
translations.nb: Jeg må møte partneren min i kveld.
translations.id: Saya harus bertemu pasangan saya malam ini.
translations.sv: Jag måste träffa min partner ikväll.
translations.ro: Trebuie să-mi întâlnesc partenera în această seară.
translations.cs: Musím se dnes večer setkat se svou partnerkou.
translations.da: Jeg skal mødes med min partner i aften.
translations.fi: Minun täytyy tavata parini tänä iltana.
translations.ja: 今夜はパートナーに会わなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (1st person singular).
Modal verb in present indicative (1st person singular), governing the infinitive 'rencontrer'.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'dois' and main lexical action.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular, feminine), modifies 'partenaire' as the direct object NP.
Common noun, head of the direct object NP of 'rencontrer'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'soir' in a temporal NP.
Common noun; head of the temporal NP 'ce soir' functioning as an adverbial.

sentences.target: Ils cherchent un partenaire pour le tournoi.
sentences.reading: /il ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ paʁ.tə.nɛʁ puʁ lə tuʁ.nwa/

translations.fr: Ils cherchent un partenaire pour le tournoi.
translations.ipa: /il ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ paʁ.tə.nɛʁ puʁ lə tuʁ.nwa/
translations.en: They are looking for a partner for the tournament.
translations.es: Buscan un compañero para el torneo.
translations.de: Sie suchen einen Partner für das Turnier.
translations.it: Stanno cercando un partner per il torneo.
translations.ko: 그들은 대회에 함께할 파트너를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在为比赛寻找搭档。
translations.yue: 佢哋正喺搵比賽嘅拍檔。
translations.pt: Eles estão procurando um parceiro para o torneio.
translations.vi: Họ đang tìm một người đánh cặp cho giải đấu.
translations.nl: Ze zoeken een partner voor het toernooi.
translations.hi: वे टूर्नामेंट के लिए एक साथी ढूंढ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουν έναν συμπαίκτη για το τουρνουά.
translations.nb: De leter etter en partner til turneringen.
translations.id: Mereka sedang mencari pasangan untuk turnamen.
translations.sv: De letar efter en partner till turneringen.
translations.da: De leder efter en makker til turneringen.
translations.ja: 大会のためにパートナーを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person plural).
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person plural).
Indefinite article introducing the direct object NP.
Common noun, head of the direct object NP of 'cherchent'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/complement PP.
Definite article modifying 'tournoi' within the PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'pour', indicating the context/purpose.
